description: Cardiac-focused early questioning. Onset, character/radiation of chest pain, and associated cardiac symptoms come first.
source: Adapted from Phase 2 plan §8.2 Condition A for MI presentation
questions: Hello, I'm your doctor today. Can you tell me what brought you to the ED?
Can you describe the pain — does it spread anywhere, like to your arm, jaw, or back?
Are you also feeling short of breath, sweaty, or nauseated right now?
Have your symptoms been getting worse, staying the same, or coming and going?
Does anything make it better or worse, such as rest or activity?
